prestazioni: Replace the stock L15B 1.5L DOHC i-VTEC I4 hybrid engine's integrated motor assist (IMA) system with a custom **Honda Performance Development (HPD) L15B7T** crate engine featuring a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger**, forged internals (Mahle pistons, Eagle H-beam rods), and a **Toda Racing Stage 3 camshaft set** (272° duration, 11.5mm lift) to support 280+ hp while retaining hybrid synergy via a **Spoon Sports hybrid battery upgrade** (lithium-ion, 20% lighter, 30% higher output).

Install a **HKS Hi-Power SPL intercooler kit** (front-mount, 60% larger core) paired with a **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller** (set to 1.2 bar) and a **Mishimoto aluminum radiator** (direct-fit, 40% increased cooling capacity) to manage heat under sustained boost in JDM urban stop-and-go conditions.

Swap the stock **Honda Grace Hybrid CVT** for a **K-Tuned K24A2 6-speed manual transmission conversion** (custom bellhousing, **PPG close-ratio gears**, **OS Giken Super Lock LSD**) with a **Tilton 76-series twin-disc clutch** and **Spoon Sports lightweight flywheel** to handle increased torque while improving throttle response and driver engagement.
estetica: Fit a **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS Honda Grace (GD6) widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, custom rear diffuser, aggressive front lip) with **TE37VOLK Racing CE28SL wheels** (18x9.5 +35 front, 18x10.5 +40 rear) wrapped in **Yokohama Advan A052 tires** (235/40/18 front, 265/35/18 rear) for a stance that clears the widened track.

Replace the stock hybrid badging with a **Spoon Sports carbon fiber hood** (functional vents, 30% weight reduction) and **J's Racing rear wing** (dual-element, 1,200mm width, adjustable angle) to balance downforce at 120+ kph while maintaining OEM+ aesthetics.

Install a **Mugen MF10 exhaust system** (titanium tips, 70mm diameter, straight-through design) with a **Giken silent joint** to reduce drone, paired with a **Recaro Sportster CS-II front seat** (Honda-specific mounting brackets) and a **Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel** (Momo quick-release hub) for a JDM executive hot rod vibe.
